title: CompetentCell

steps: Inoculate 100 µL of E. coli in 10 mL of antibiotic-free starter LB culture medium. Incubate during Overnight at 37 °C and 225 rpm, °C, rpm, ,
Heat the LB media in the water bath at 37 °C
Inoculate 40 mL of LB media with 1 mL of cell culture from step 1.
Incubate at 37 °C with constant agitation ( 225 rpm, °C, during 00:30:00 ).
Measure de optical density at 600 nm every 00:30:00 until an OD600 of 0.4-0.6 is reached.
Discard the supernatant, add 20 mL of CaCl Contributed by users solution 50 mM and resuspend carefully.
Discard the supernatant, add 5 mL of CaCl2 solution 100 mM and resuspend carefully. Chill On ice for 00:20:00
